headline: Fable launches in late February after recent delay
summary: Fable, the long-awaited RPG, will launch on February 23rd, 2027. Microsoft revealed new footage at the Xbox Games Showcase. This marks the first new entry in the franchise since 2010.

headline: Halo: Campaign Evolved arrives July 28th
summary: Halo: Campaign Evolved, a remake of Combat Evolved's campaign, launches July 28th. It will be available on Xbox Series S/X, PC, and PS5. Microsoft unveiled new details at the Xbox Games Showcase.

headline: Gears of War: E-Day is no longer coming to the PS5
summary: Gears of War: E-Day will now be an Xbox console exclusive. It will no longer launch on PlayStation 5 as previously announced. The game is set to release on October 6th.

headline: The Verge Weekend Questionnaire
summary: The Verge introduces a new weekly series: The Verge Weekend Questionnaire. It explores how musicians and tech CEOs stay focused and their essential apps. A new guest will be featured every Saturday.

headline: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie Crosses $1 Billion at the Box Office
summary: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie has surpassed $1 billion globally. The film achieved a major box office milestone. It continues to perform strongly in theaters worldwide.

headline: Aether & Iron Creators Reveal New Updates, Future Plans for “Two Thirds” of the Game Left on the Cutting Room Floor | IGN Live 2026
summary: Aether & Iron creators discussed future updates and plans at IGN Live 2026. They revealed two-thirds of the tactical RPG's content was cut from the original scope. The developers shared how the current game sets up potential sequels.

headline: Hot Wheels Infinite Rush Gameplay Reveals Huge Freely Explorable Islands | IGN Live 2026
summary: Hot Wheels Infinite Rush gameplay showed new, freely explorable islands. The game replaces traditional tracks with four massive diorama environments. Milestone showcased this exclusive look at IGN Live 2026.

headline: Xbox Games Showcase 2026 Live Updates: Every Game Announcement
summary: The Xbox Games Showcase 2026 featured multiple new game announcements. Many reveals and surprises were unveiled during the event. This article compiles a list of every announcement from the showcase.

headline: Lammy says he told JD Vance his Nowak comments were 'wrong'
summary: Lammy stated he informed JD Vance that his comments on Henry Nowak's death were 'wrong'. Vance had linked Nowak's death to a 'mass invasion of migrants'. Lammy asserted the death was unrelated to mass migration.

headline: Zelensky criticises 'vile' Chornobyl drone strike ahead of London talks
summary: Zelensky condemned a 'vile' Russian drone strike near the Chornobyl plant. A drone reportedly hit a spent nuclear fuel storage facility. The criticism comes ahead of scheduled London talks.

headline: M&S launches new traineeship for 1,000 young people
summary: M&S has introduced a new traineeship program for 1,000 young people. The initiative targets individuals not in employment, education, or training. It aims to address the rising challenge of youth unemployment and lack of skills.

headline: Steve Rosenberg: Russia's economic forum overshadowed by drone attacks on St Petersburg
summary: Russia's economic forum in St Petersburg was overshadowed by drone attacks. Ukrainian drones reportedly targeted the city during the event. The BBC's Russia editor noted the impact on Putin's flagship event.
